pr.title: Submission: DominationV2 + BOS-Reset Bigram Cache + TTT (val_bpb=1.1382, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: DominationV2’s U-Net/SmearGate stack adds TTT plus a BOS-reset bigram cache that entropy-weights doc-local counts with model probabilities after quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Regular training on full data followed by eval-time cache enhancements, not a val-only regime.
techniques: Entropy-gated BOS-reset bigram cache blend post-quantization
